beat: In the same dry village courtyard at noon, a thirsty black crow flies in under a broad tree, searching for water, and notices a clay pot near the roots.
environment_anchor: same dry village courtyard at noon, dusty earth, broad tree, earthen clay pot, scattered pebbles, warm sunlight, still background

beat: Still in the same courtyard, the crow lands on the rim of the clay pot, looks inside, and realizes the water level is too low to reach with its beak.
environment_anchor: same dry village courtyard at noon, dusty earth, broad tree, earthen clay pot, scattered pebbles, warm sunlight, still background
character_lock: keep one single black crow consistent in size, feathers, beak, and bright eyes; keep the same clay pot, same tree, same dusty courtyard; show the water deep inside the pot and difficult to reach; no humans, no extra birds, no background change

beat: Without changing the setting, the crow looks down at the ground beside the pot, notices several small stones, and understands that the stones may help raise the water.
environment_anchor: same dry village courtyard at noon, dusty earth, broad tree, earthen clay pot, scattered pebbles, warm sunlight, still background
character_lock: keep one single black crow consistent in size, feathers, beak, and bright eyes; keep the same clay pot, same tree, same dusty courtyard; keep the stones clearly visible near the pot; no humans, no extra birds, no background change

beat: In the same background, the crow picks up small stones one by one and drops them into the clay pot, and the water starts rising a little.

character_lock: keep one single black crow consistent in size, feathers, beak, and bright eyes; keep the same clay pot, same tree, same dusty courtyard; show more stones inside the pot and the water visibly near the top; no humans, no extra birds, no background change
